parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO helpdesk_logs (log_type, message, category, priority, summary, created_at)
VALUES (
  'AI_RESPONSE',
  '{{ $json.original_message }}',
  '{{ $json.category }}',
  '{{ $json.priority }}',
  '{{ $json.summary }}',
  NOW()
)

=INSERT INTO helpdesk_tickets (
  employee_name,
  department,
  category,
  priority,
  status,
  subject,
  description,
  created_at
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.reporter_name || "Unknown" }}',
  '{{ $json.department || "Unknown" }}',
  '{{ $json.category }}',
  '{{ $json.priority }}',
  'OPEN',
  '{{ $json.summary }}',
  '{{ $json.original_message }}',
  NOW()
)
RETURNING ticket_id

=INSERT INTO helpdesk_logs (log_type, ticket_id, message, category, priority, summary, created_at)
VALUES (
  'ESCALATION',
  {{ $json.ticket_id }},
  '{{ $('Parse Agent Response').first().json.original_message }}',
  '{{ $('Parse Agent Response').first().json.category }}',
  '{{ $('Parse Agent Response').first().json.priority }}',
  '{{ $('Parse Agent Response').first().json.summary }}',
  NOW()
)
